To Rome with Love (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,684,352Details
International Box Office $57,605,953
Worldwide Box Office $74,290,305
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $733,363
Total $733,363
Further financial details...

Synopsis

To Rome With Love is a story about a number of people in Italy, some American, some Italian, some residents, some visitors, and the romances and adventures and predicaments they get into

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$361,359 (2.2% of total gross)
Legs:5.37 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:22.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$21,500,000 (worldwide box office is 3.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:5 opening theaters/806 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $25,068,447

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 22nd, 2012 (Limited) by Sony Pictures Classics
July 6th, 2012 (Expands Wide) by Sony Pictures Classics
International Releases: April 20th, 2012 (Wide) (Italy)
June 28th, 2012 (Wide) (Argentina)
June 29th, 2012 (Wide) (Brazil)
June 29th, 2012 (Wide) (Norway)
June 29th, 2012 (Wide) (Uruguay)
Video Release: January 15th, 2013 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment, released as To Rome With Love
MPA Rating: R for some sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2221, 5/2/2012)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Breaking the Fourth Wall, Directing Yourself, Ensemble, Segments
Plot point: Architecture, Imaginary Character, Non-Chronological, Opera, Relationships Gone Wrong
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Medusa Film, Gravier Productions, Perdido
Production Countries: United States, Italy
Languages: English, Italian
